name: Ananya Krishnan
title: Senior ML Engineer
summary: 7 years of ML engineering with focus on LLM fine-tuning and semantic search. Led RLHF pipeline at DeepMind for Gemini evaluation suite. Published at NeurIPS 2023.

name: Marcus Osei
title: ML Engineer
summary: 4 years building ML-powered recommendation and personalisation systems at Spotify. Strong MLOps background, active Kaggle contributor.

name: Priya Mehta
title: AI Research Engineer
summary: PhD in ML with 6 years of research-to-production experience. Deep expertise in alignment techniques (DPO, RLHF). 5 publications including ICML 2024 best paper.

name: Tyler Nguyen
title: Data Scientist
summary: 3 years as a data scientist at Accenture doing business analytics and dashboarding. Limited deep learning experience. Primarily works with tabular data.

name: Lena Fischer
title: Senior NLP Engineer
summary: 5 years of NLP engineering with focus on transformer fine-tuning and semantic retrieval. Built Zalando's product search embedding pipeline serving 40M queries/day.

name: Raj Patel
title: MLOps Engineer
summary: 5 years of MLOps experience at Databricks. Expert in ML infrastructure, model deployment, and monitoring. Strong in platform engineering but limited in model research.

name: Sofia Martinez
title: Applied AI Engineer
summary: 4 years working on LLM evaluation and alignment at Scale AI. Extensive experience with frontier model APIs and building robust evaluation pipelines. Quick responder, fully remote-ready.

name: James Whitfield
title: Software Engineer
summary: 8 years as a backend software engineer in financial services. Very limited ML experience. Would need significant upskilling to transition into an AI/ML role.

name: Chen Wei
title: Research Scientist
summary: PhD researcher with 6 years focused on dense retrieval and semantic search. 8 publications on ANN algorithms and bi-encoder architectures. High GitHub presence with popular open-source retrieval library.

name: Amara Okonkwo
title: Junior ML Engineer
education: B.Sc. Computer Engineering, University of Lagos
summary: 1 year of ML experience building classification models. Enthusiastic learner, completed fast.ai and DeepLearning.AI specialisations. Not yet ready for a senior IC role.

name: Nina Volkov
title: Senior AI Engineer
education: M.Sc. Applied Mathematics, Moscow State University
summary: 7 years building search and ranking systems at Yandex. Deep expertise in learning-to-rank models and embedding-based retrieval. Strong mathematical foundations.

name: Ethan Cole
title: Prompt Engineer
summary: 2 years freelancing as a prompt engineer. Limited traditional ML engineering background. Good at wrapping LLM APIs but lacks depth in model training and infrastructure.

name: Isabela Santos
title: Staff ML Engineer
summary: 9 years of ML engineering, the last 4 as Staff at Nubank leading the credit risk ML platform. Strong end-to-end ML lifecycle experience but less focus on LLMs specifically.

name: Kevin Park
title: AI Platform Engineer
summary: 5 years building AI-powered search and chat systems at Kakao. Experience fine-tuning LLMs for Korean NLP and deploying semantic search at scale.

name: Zara Ali
title: ML Research Lead
summary: PhD + 8 years, currently ML Research Lead at Hugging Face. Core contributor to the transformers library. 11 publications, deep expertise in parameter-efficient fine-tuning (LoRA, PEFT) and alignment. Top candidate.
